speaker: MATT
raw_text: You see crimson start to pour down the front as she (choking). Go ahead and roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So here's the first. The first is 24.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, the second is 26. As you can tell, I've been screaming monster sounds. My voice is a little ragged. 26 on the second.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 misses. But the first two strike true.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The first, it's three plus seven is ten. Plus 14, 20, 26, 29, 33, 39. That's the first one. And then the second one does four plus six is ten. Oh! But it's surprise, so the first one is doubled because it's automatically a crit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so what's that now?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, it was 39, so now it's 60, 78. For the first one. Ten for the second.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So 88 points of damage. You just went 80 miles per hour on your first turn. As you kick the doors open. (whoosh) The first dagger, he sees it coming towards him for a second and attempts to dodge out of the way, and as he moves this eye out of the way, the dagger (impact noise) right into this one, he screams out (screaming) in pain as it just plunges into his eye socket. Not deep enough to actually hit any brain, but enough to definitely take that eye out as any sort of viable method. The second one just hits him in the shoulder and a reaction to that, Cassandra screams out, "No, run! It's a trap!" At which point, he takes his dagger and just runs it across her throat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (softly) I don't think it's her. It's not her.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: This is your movement and then dash action, you guys, because you guys were down in this area, heading down the stairs. You just made it up and over. And this is Ripley. We'll use that for Ripley for now. Everyone else roll initiative. We're in a new combat round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. The second one now is going to go ahead and take two swings at you. That is an 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but I'll use uncanny dodge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To reduce the damage by half?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so the first strike hits you for 13 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So, half that or all of that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. And then that's going to be a 24 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And this is not halved. Okay, that's 12 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, now to Cassandra's turn. She is on the ground just spilling out her life essence onto the ground. She's clutching at her throat and is like (gasping). You hear that horrible sucking sound of her feeling her life drain from her. She's not unconscious, but she doesn't have long for this world. All right, that brings us to the top of the round. The rest of you guys are now rushing, I assume, dash motion, making your way as fast as you can to that side. Due to distance, you would all get to the end of this hallway, about there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten. Okay. The ghost reaches out and embraces Keyleth. It disappears into her form and she shivers for a second, and it is no longer visible.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, he's taken over her body?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth's eyes all of a sudden flare up with a ghostly blue glow, and she turns around, looking at the group with a hunger you haven't seen in her eyes. For those who see it, as well-- I should have made this happen before-- I need you guys to immediately after seeing these ghosts make a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, just the ones that see it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're all immune to fear because of the feast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right, so never mind. That doesn't matter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Good reminding. So I was right, then. I didn't forget anything! All right, charisma saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope. This is not a charm.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so a 12 for me. Am I caught, as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That was your last Luck, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Grog is batting for the other team.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (muffled) We don't even have a cleric with us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And with that, three of your teammates turn around, their eyes intensely glowing with some sort of a weird ghostly glow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Three v three, man. Battle royale. Let's do this.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, we have to fight them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He's going to call it at eight. He's going to call it.
